positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a majestic mountain range at dawn. The composition features clean, geometric silhouettes of layered peaks against a gradient sky of soft apricot, pastel lavender, and pale cerulean blue. A single, stylized rising sun motif casts long, sharp shadows. The overall style is clean line art meets vector illustration, rendered with high contrast and perfect symmetry. The design must be perfectly contained within the square frame, suitable for repeating pattern or central apparel print, featuring a solid white background for maximum contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, lowres, noisy, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, distracting elements, gradients (in the negative sense)
